channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-553] Add checkpatch.pl to validate patches for Lustre coding style
item.description: Add a modified version of the Linux kernel checkpatch.pl script (from 2.6.38) to Lustre for validating patches against the Lustre coding style. The Lustre coding style is largely the same as the kernel, except using spaces instead of tabs for indenting.
item.summary: Add checkpatch.pl to validate patches for Lustre coding style

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-master » i686,server,el5,ofa #363
LU-553 build: improve checks for commit-msg (Revision 3f5e72e4cff0d5238fa3ef7a7acf27c86ea973e8)

Result = SUCCESS

Files :

  • build/checkpatch.pl

Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,client,el6,inkernel #144
LU-553 add checkpatch.pl for Lustre coding style

Johann Lombardi : 6f6cefdbe2d5e610513287fd44165fb88831cfc1
Files :

  • build/autoMakefile.am.toplevel
  • build/checkpatch.pl
There is a 1.8 patch for this at http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1167 that I've been trying to land but it has seen minor problems that have prevented it from landing.

Can this be pushed to b1_8 also?

The Whamcloud wiki pages describing how to submit changes (http://wiki.whamcloud.com/display/PUB/Submitting+Changes) and use Gerrit (http://wiki.whamcloud.com/display/PUB/Using+Gerrit) both mention using the build/checkpatch.pl script. This can be confusing to new developers when the script isn't present.

LU-553 add checkpatch.pl for Lustre coding style

Oleg Drokin : 29bf7f071e41526122d57ceabbd3ef1c503a275d
Files :

Patch is in http://review.whamcloud.com/1164. This just adds the patch for now. There is also an associated git commit hook, but I don't know if that should go into Gerrit/Git or not.
